# Fortera Homes

> Premium residential development at 82 Genest St, Ottawa, ON, Canada. Currently in pre-registration — floor plans, pricing, and project details coming soon.

Fortera Homes is a real estate developer building a landmark 8-unit, 3-storey residential building at 82 Genest St in Ottawa's Beachwood South neighbourhood. The development emphasizes premium construction quality, superior craftsmanship, and enduring value. Estimated completion is Spring 2027.

## The Development

- **Address:** 82 Genest St, Ottawa, ON, Canada
- **Units:** 8 residential units
- **Storeys:** 3
- **Status:** Active development — pre-registration open
- **Estimated completion:** Spring 2027
- **Developer:** Fortera Homes

## Project Timeline

- 2025: Planning & Design (current phase)
- 2025–2026: Permits & Approvals
- 2026: Construction
- Spring 2027: Estimated Completion

## Location & Neighbourhood

82 Genest St is located in Beachwood South, one of Ottawa's most walkable and bikeable urban neighbourhoods.

- **Walk Score:** 94 — Walker's Paradise (daily errands do not require a car)
- **Transit Score:** 58 — Good Transit (many nearby public transportation options)
- **Bike Score:** 99 — Biker's Paradise (daily errands can be accomplished on a bike)

## About Fortera Homes

Fortera Homes is grounded in hands-on construction expertise. The company is committed to superior craftsmanship, responsible development, and building lasting communities. Core values include vision-driven design, premium build quality, strategic site selection, and trusted execution with full transparency.

Mission: to build lasting homes and enduring value by utilizing hands-on construction expertise to develop high-quality communities with integrity and vision.

## Register Interest

Prospective buyers and investors can register their interest at:
https://forterahomes.ca/#contact

Registrants will be among the first to receive floor plans, pricing, timelines, and project updates.

## Website

https://forterahomes.ca
